acceptance_condition: computeCommitmentRisk scales the money signal by magnitude and collapses informational money movement, so a $7,199.50 statutory waiver structurally outranks a $2.71 statement credit / $6.50 milk frother / $21.66 subscription; real-data regression test green; lib/signals suite + typecheck + gate:continuity green.
